classification_scope: governed retrieval boundary with promoted collector planning evidence; not an exhaustive file inventory

baseline_observation.commit_semantics: verified main observation anchor before this evidence-reconciliation pull request; live Git determines the current head

latest_merged_increment.title: Refresh project state after governance merges

entries.claim_boundary: proves committed infrastructure intent and implementation, not deployment success
proves committed deterministic behavior and tested contracts, not live operational state
proves workflow definitions; workflow-run evidence is required to prove execution outcome
orientation only; verify implementation and runtime claims against narrower evidence
use state sections as a starting point and verify every consequential claim against Git, PR, CI, and Azure evidence
records bounded reviewed findings and unresolved gates; raw workflow artifacts and runtime evidence remain authoritative for underlying environment details
planned service-path sections are not proof of implementation; source and implementation status decide current state
verify commands and gates against the current lifecycle workflow before execution
verify image, disk, identity, networking, and bootstrap details against current Bicep, cloud-init, and promoted Azure evidence

reviewing browser behavior, report validation, or fallback logic
determining configured live-report source or fixture fallback

entries.claim_boundary: records promoted active work, handoffs, environment facts, and deployment history; live Git, CI, workflow artifacts, and runtime evidence still determine current external state
governs retrieval, promotion, and archival behavior; it does not prove implementation or runtime state
historical context only; never overrides current material
must be classified and verified before supporting a current-state claim
